title: Late-life depression sex gap: DIF and robustness analysis
description: Versioned R and Python analysis code for a cross-cohort study of sex differences, differential item functioning, measurement invariance, and robustness of late-life depressive symptoms in CHARLS, HRS, and ELSA. Participant-level cohort data are not included because they are distributed by third-party providers under their respective access terms.
